sso.note: CLOUD Microsoft Entra ID sign-in (needs internet). Disabled by default in favour of local Active Directory (see the ldap block). To use Entra instead, set enabled:true and fill tenantId/clientId with your Entra App registration GUIDs (deploy/ENTRA-SSO-SETUP.md).

ldap.note: Local Active Directory sign-in over LDAPS. Set enabled:true and point url at a domain controller. Secrets come from env: LDAP_BIND_DN + LDAP_BIND_PASSWORD (a read-only service account used to look up users); url/baseDN can also be overridden via LDAP_URL / LDAP_BASE_DN / LDAP_ENABLED. roleGroups maps AD security groups (full DN or bare CN) to app roles — a user with no matching group is denied unless defaultRole is set. stageGroups optionally maps groups to stage competencies (1-4); empty = all stages. See deploy/AD-SSO-SETUP.md.

notify.note: Paste a Teams Incoming Webhook URL and/or SMTP details to enable hold/reject alerts and the manager digest. secure=true uses implicit TLS (port 465); secure=false uses STARTTLS (port 587). Leave user/pass blank for an unauthenticated relay.

tolerances.note: Used for auto pass/fail flags. Edit in Admin > Tolerances.

storage.note: PRODUCTION uses PostgreSQL via the DATABASE_URL env var (set by docker-compose); this block is ignored whenever DATABASE_URL is present. Without DATABASE_URL the app uses a local data/db.json file (dev / on-prem only). SQLite is not supported.

backup.note: Rotating copies of data/db.json into data/backups/. intervalMin = minutes between snapshots; keep = how many newest snapshots to retain.

security.note: Password-login throttle: after maxLoginFails wrong attempts (per username+IP) within windowMin minutes, that login is locked for lockMin minutes. In-memory; resets on restart.

reports.note: Automatic manager digest emails. schedule = off | daily | weekly | monthly. hour = 0-23 (server local time); dayOfWeek 0=Sun..6=Sat for weekly; dayOfMonth 1-28 for monthly. Sends to notify.email.to via SMTP and/or the Teams webhook.
